title: quercus dinghuensis
intro: Quercus dinghuensis, also known as the Dinghu oak or Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fagaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus dinghuensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Quercus dinghuensis is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions to promote overall well-being and vitality.
